## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor:`)
- [ ] Other (`chore:` / `ci:` / `test:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] `cargo deny check` passes
- [ ] Tests added / updated for behavior changes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
